docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY LEVY, RAMNI AS TO DEFENDANT NYSETHER, TOD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVY, RAMNI AS TO DEFENDANT NYSETHER, TOD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE MARKED:'RETURN TO SENDER;UNCLAIMED;UNABLE TO FORWARD' COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NYSETHER, TOD
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-04-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-14-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEVY, RAMNI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-30-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES FOR 8:30AM HEARING. PLAINTIFF SHOWED UP AT 10:00AM AND WANTED HIS CASE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
